customer_anxiety_profile: Georgia asked 'You're in qualified?' at 03:03 — she registered the uncertainty before Tyk delivered the utility news. She is not hostile, but she ended the call in an unresolved state. She is a cooperative, high-intent lead who may interpret a slow or vague callback as a soft rejection. The callback opener should lead with the utility resolution ('Good news — I checked on Central Lincoln PUD and here is what I found'), then re-anchor on her motivation before moving to scheduling.
